_about: Published by Claude (the grader). Keys match proof items in the tracker (ml:, o1:, ms:). Each value: {grade, status, note}. status = verified | needs-work | pending. The tracker fetches this on load and shows the grade/verdict automatically.

ml:LLMs & generative AI (her edge)_3.note: Done and then some — 120+ deployed Gemini-powered agents. Agent #99 (LLM/GenAI Roadmap) is a genuinely useful, polished tool with a real playground (prompt builder, token/cost estimator, embeddings, RAG-chunking demo).

ml:Proof of work_0.note: Far exceeds 2-3 deployed AI projects — 120+ are live. Next level: turn 2-3 of the strongest into deep, documented flagships rather than relying on volume.

ml:★ In-demand builds (ship these — Meta.note: You've demoed RAG *concepts* (chunking) inside agent #99, but not built a real RAG system. To verify: embed your own notes/knowledge base, add retrieval, and deploy it as its own app.

ms:q1_6.note: Portfolio (hhanng.github.io) is live and impressive. To fully hit this: pin the top repo on your GitHub profile and give it a real README — problem, architecture, a demo GIF, and the live link.
